positive: Minimalist celestial jungle scene, featuring elegant geometric monstera leaves intertwined with bioluminescent stylized vines and crystalline star clusters. The color palette is deep indigo and vibrant emerald green, contrasted by glowing gold and soft cyan accents. The composition is perfectly centered and symmetrical, designed as a seamless repeating pattern, with clean, defined silhouettes suitable for apparel printing. Highly contrasted graphic style with sharp edges and ethereal depth. Mid-century modern graphic poster aesthetic, flat vector art influence, studio lighting, ultra-detailed.
negative: blur, low resolution, noisy, messy, artifacts, watermark, logo, text, signature, extra limbs, bad anatomy, jpeg artifacts, poorly drawn, amateur, gradient wash
